seo.title: BC Fabrication | Metal & Composite Side Gates and Driveway Gates
seo.description: BC Fabrication supplies bespoke metal and composite side gates and driveway gates. Request a quote online.
seo.keywords: metal side gates, composite side gates, driveway gates, composite driveway gates, bespoke gates

hero.title: Bespoke side gates and driveway gates built to suit your property
hero.text: BC Fabrication designs and fabricates made-to-measure metal and composite gates with a clean, modern finish. Every project is built for security, durability, and kerb appeal.

services_intro.title: Made-to-measure gates for side access and driveways
services_intro.text: We specialise in strong fabricated metal and composite gate systems designed for a smart finish and long-lasting performance.

services.title: Metal side gates
services.text: Strong fabricated side gates designed for security and everyday use.

services.title: Composite side gates
services.text: Low-maintenance side gates with a modern look and added privacy.

services.title: Driveway gates
services.text: Made-to-measure driveway gates in metal or composite for kerb appeal and durability.

services.title: Powder-coated finishes
services.text: Durable finishes designed to look smart and last.

services.title: Bespoke fabrication
services.text: Every gate is built around your sizes and preferred style.

services.title: UK-wide enquiries
services.text: Serving customers across the UK from our base in Bolton.

gallery_intro.title: Real BC Fabrication work
gallery_intro.text: A selection of recent side gate and driveway gate installations.

about.title: Clean fabrication, strong finishes, and real project photos

items.title: Made to measure
items.text: Built to suit your opening and your chosen style.

items.title: Professional finish
items.text: Modern fabricated frames with quality composite and metal options.

items.title: Simple quoting
